title: Andijan State Medical Institute Ranking, Uzbekistan
description: Andijan State Medical Institute, established in 1955, is one of Uzbekistan's oldest and most respected medical institutes.

Andijan State Medical Institute Ranking, Uzbekistan

Andijan state medical institute is one of best medical institutes in Uzbekistan which was established in 1955, making it one of the oldest institutes in the region.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Uzbekistan
  • January 25, 2025
  • Home
  • Uzbekistan
  • Andijan State Medical Institute Ranking, Uzbekistan
# Uzbekistan

Andijan State Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

Andijan state medical institute is one of best medical institutes in Uzbekistan which was established in 1955, making it one of the oldest institutes in the region. The Institute offers general medicine, specialist medicine, pediatrics, and dentistry. Because of a program started by the Uzbekistan Government, the Institute has been granted recognition by WHO and the National Medical Council of India which allows it to be accepted globally. It is also a great option for international students as the medium of instruction is English. Along with the six year MBBS program, the university also has an internship program which lasts one year.

Andijan State Medical Institute has an updated campus which is equipped with modern technological systems. This In a single facility, it includes a variety of classrooms, numerous laboratories, as well as a single library with over 250 thousand books. Students are provided with many incredible opportunities through the world-class professors and the assisted exchange programs.

Because students from every nation come to pursue their education, Andijan state medical institutes provides hostel services that maintain a multicultural environment. This excelled offered visa eligibility along with no donation or high tuition fees is a great opportunity for MBBS students looking to study abroad.

Quick Highlights of Andijan Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

Year of Establishment1955
TypeGovernment
RecognitionNMC and WHO approved

Course Duration6 Years

Affiliation and Recognition of Andijan State Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

The Andijan State Medical Institute is proudly affiliated with multiple international legal organizations, which guarantees the acceptability of its medical degrees anywhere in the world. Its main affiliations and recognitions are outlined below.

World Health Organization (WHO)

The medical institute is covered by the WHO making it a medical school accredited on an international level. 

National Medical Council (NMC)

Indian students are able to practice medicine in India after obtaining a degree from Andijan State Medical Institute, thanks to its recognition by NMC. 

Ministry of Higher and Secondary Specialized Education, Uzbekistan

The institute operates under the education minister of Uzbekistan, and thus it adheres to the country’s requirements for a medical training institution. 

These credentials expand the credibility of the institute, making certain that students get a quality education which does not only meet national standards but international as well.

Get Call Back from Atlas Mentor Counsellors

MBBS Course Duration at Andijan State Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

At Andijan State Medical Institute, the duration of the MBBS program is 6 academic years.

First Five Years: The students undertake basic and integrated theoretical and clinical training in anatomy, physiology, pathology, and clinical medicine.

Last One Year: This year is reserved for a final internship which has components of practical work in hospitals and clinics under supervision of certified specialists.

The program structure permits students to obtain relevant medical competencies alongside practical experience.

Facilities at Andijan State Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

Andijan state medical institute promotes the student’s comfort and provides a variety of services: 

Hostel Facilities

The institute has hostels with rooms fully furnished and equipped with Wi-Fi, аir conditioning, space heaters, beds, cupboards, along with all relevant appliances. 

Cafeteria

An expansive and hygienic cafeteria serves as an aseptic food service operation where students of different countries are offered a variety of meals through a la carte system. 

Library

The library possesses more than 250,000 books and journals, and other materials. There is an e-library and reading halls for students as well. 

Healthcare Services

Students can access the health facilities within the school premises to take care of their physical well-being within the duration of their stay.

Multicultural Environment

The institute accommodates foreign students who adds a multicultural touch to the school facilitating international students.

With these services, Andijan state medical institute students enjoy a favorable environment which is in line with their academic ambitions.

Eligibility Criteria To Study at Andijan State Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

In order to pursue an MBBS course in Andijan State Medical Institute, students need to meet the following requirements: 

Age

The student has to be at least 17 years of age and not more than 25 years during the period of admission. 

Educational Qualification

Students have to complete Higher Secondary School (Class 12) with at least 50% in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology combined. 

NEET Qualification.

One must qualify for the NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test) in order to gain admission. 

Language Proficiency

Neither IELTS nor TOEFL is required since the language of Instruction is English. 

These requirements, if met, guarantee successful admission to the Andijan State Medical Institute.

Reasons for Choosing Andijan State Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

Andijan State Medical Institute has continually been selected by students due to the affordable costs of medical education at the institute. Here are some reasons why it stands out: 

Affordable Education

Tuition fees and living cost are offered at lower prices as compared to the majority of other nations. 

English Medium

International students are offered higher chances of attending classes through the fact that all lectures are delivered in English. 

Experienced Faculty

The institute has a large number of experts and professors that provide proper direction and knowledge to the students. 

Modern Campus Facilities

The Institute possesses well furnished lectures halls, practical rooms, and the largest library in the country containing over two hundred fifty thousand works. 

Global Recognition

Like other international institutions, the Andijan State Medical Institute is also a member of the WHO, NMC, and other international bodies which guarantees acceptance of the degree without restrictions. 

Diverse Student Community

Here, students from various nations are able to learn which enhances the educational and cultural interaction. 

Practical Training

The institute ensures that every student has relevant practical training with the use of modern medical equipment as well as in medical institutions.

These factors make Andijan State Medical Institute an ideal destination for students willing to study MBBS abroad.

Documents Required for Admission At Andijan State Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

To get admission at Andijan State Medical Institute, students must submit the following documents:

Filled Application Form

A completed application form available on the official website of the institute must be printed and signed.

Class 12 Certificate

Attach a copy of Higher Secondary School’s (Class 12) marksheet for Physics, Chemistry, and Biology subjects.

Passport

The student’s passport must be valid for at least 2 years.

Passport-Sized Photographs

Attach recent passport-sized photographs as per the specifications mentioned.

Birth Certificate

Attach a certified copy of birth certificate.

Medical Certificate

A health certificate confirming that the applicant is medically fit.

Migration Certificate

A migration certificate from previously attended school/college.

These documents are essential for completing the admission process at Andijan State Medical Institute.

Admission Procedure of Andijan State Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

The admission process for Andijan State Medical Institute is simple and straightforward. Follow these steps:

Choose a Course and Fill the Application Form

Pick your preferred course such as MBBS. Complete the application form provided on the institute’s website.

Submit Required Documents

Submit the already filled application form alongside the required documents, which include Class 12 certificate, passport, and medical certificate.

Email the application form to the institute.

Receive Confirmation Letter

Post evaluation of your application and verification of all documents, the institute will send out a confirmation letter.

Pay the Fees

To confirm your seat, pay the required academic fees in accordance with the specified structure.

Receive Invitation Letter

Upon payment of the tuition fees, the institute shall dispatch an invitation letter, Visa support letter and admission letter by post.

Apply for a Visa

With the letter of invitation, apply at the Uzbekistan embassy in your country for a student visa.

Travel and Join

Travel to Uzbekistan and enroll yourself with the institute after the visa gets approved.

This approach facilitates timely admission for students coming from foreign countries.

Fees Structure of Andijan State Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

Particulars Year 1 Year 2 Year 3 Year 4 Year 5 Year 6
Tuition Fee 3850 USD 3850 USD 3850 USD 3850 USD 3850 USD 3850 USD
Hostel Fee 600 USD 600 USD 600 USD 600 USD 600 USD 600 USD

The Andijan State Medical Institute has a reasonable fee structure for MBBS especially for international students.

Students will pay 3850 USD per year for every year over the course of six years. Along with that, there is a hostel fee fixed at 600 USD a year. There are no other charges or donations on admission.

The total cost per year encompasses all this, that is, the tuition and the hostel fees. Suffice to say, these fees are set estimates and can fluctuate based on fluctuations in currency exchange rates. Currently, 1 USD is set at ₹82, but this is subject to change.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) About Andijan State Medical Institute, Uzbekistan

Here are some frequently asked questions concerning the Andijan State Medical Institute.

Is it necessary to take NEET in order to get admission into Andijan State Medical Institute?

Yes, Andijan State Medical Institute requires students to have a NEET score for admission into the MBBS Program.

What is Mediation of Instruction at Andijan State Medical Institute?

Because the Essycng-English speaking allocation level international students is able to easily understand and follow the other aspects of the courses at the Health institute.

Is there any other entrance examination apart from the NEET for admission into MBBS?

No. There is no other noted examination in Andijan State Medical Institute, admission is allowed based on the NEET results and IQ tests conducted.

Is Andijan State Medical Institute a school of good standing and reputation internationally?

Yes, the institute is recognized by the WHO and NMC and therefore the medical degree obtained is accepted in many other countries.

What are the hostel facilities like at Andijan State Medical Institute?

The institute provides comfortable accommodation to international students in well furnished hostel rooms with essential Wi-Fi facilities and air conditioning.

The above questions and answers surely help any potential student to understand the structure of Andijan State Medical Institute.
